summary: Iteration 22 - Vapi Voice Agent and Zelis Payment Vendor Integration Testing. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all tabs and components working correctly. Vapi voice integration enabled with webhook handling for tool-calls, status-update, and end-of-call-report events. Zelis payment vendor (MOCKED) supports 5 payment methods with ERA 835 generation.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly (known from previous iterations)

seed_data_creation: Created test Vapi webhook calls and Zelis transactions during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 tested Vapi Voice Agent and Zelis Payment Vendor integrations. Vapi assistant is configured (assistant_id: f5804e4b-3d6a-4146-a614-08cf359e50db). Vapi webhook at POST /api/vapi/webhook does NOT require auth. Zelis payment API is MOCKED (internal simulation). 2 Zelis transactions exist: ZEL-1855BA24 (ACH, $46.10) and ZEL-E3867A90 (Virtual Card, $111.08). 1 ERA 835 document generated (ERA20260330B720A6) with 3 transactions totaling $228.18. AI Agent page has 4 tabs (Text Agent, Voice Agent, Sessions, Call Logs). Payment Center has 5 tabs (Payments, Batch Run, Reversals, Zelis Network, ERA 835).

endpoints_tested: GET /api/zelis/methods - Returns 5 payment methods (ach, virtual_card, check, ach_plus, zapp)
GET /api/zelis/summary - Returns transaction summary (2 transactions, $157.18 total)
POST /api/zelis/submit - Submit claim payment via Zelis (ACH method)
POST /api/zelis/era-835 - Generate ERA 835 for payment IDs
zelis_payment_vendor.note: Zelis Payment API is MOCKED (internal simulation)
